sections.paragraph:
κατανάθεμα, ατος, τό (s. next entry, also κατάθεμα, ἀνάθεμα) that which is devoted or given over to a deity, accursed thing Rv 22:3 t.r. (Erasmian rdg.; s. κατάθεμα).—DELG s.v. τίθημι.

t.r. t.r. = textus receptus

rdg. rdg. = reading(s)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 522
